DEAD（The Dead One）

Am I still alive?

Dimension Pattern: LLL-LLM-LML-LLL-LHM
Congratulations, you got one of the rarest personalities in China. The name sounds unlucky, so you can also think of it as “Don’t Expect Any Drives.” DEAD has seen through all the pointless philosophy and has lost interest in anything that looks like gain or loss. They look at the world like a top player who has beaten every main quest, side quest, and hidden mission so many times that they finally realize the game itself is the joke. DEAD is the ultimate sage beyond desire and goals.

Think you might be {{code}}? Take the test and find out!

Start SBTI Test
